verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Turn your eyes upon Jesus Look full in his wonderful face. And the things of earth will grow strangely dim in the light of his glory and grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Turn your eyes upon Jesus for all of our life is in him. To know him always as way and truth is how melting all sorrow and sin.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Turn your eyes upon Jesus Bow down before his throne of grace. This king of glory is coming again To take the waits, trusting in him.
